prompt: I want to create a skill that helps me write git commit messages. It should analyze staged changes and generate conventional commit messages with the right type prefix (feat, fix, chore, etc). The skill needs to handle monorepo scopes and should include a script that parses git diffs. Can you create this skill for me?
assertions: A SKILL.md file exists in the output skill directory
The SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter with name and description fields
The name field uses only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
The description includes 'Use when' trigger conditions
The SKILL.md body contains a numbered workflow or step-by-step instructions
A scripts/ directory exists with at least one Bun TypeScript script (.ts file)
The script includes a --help flag or usage documentation
An evals/evals.json file exists with at least 2 test cases
The SKILL.md body includes a Common mistakes or pitfalls section
The SKILL.md body is under 500 lines
The script uses structured JSON output to stdout

prompt: hey so i've been doing a lot of data cleaning work in python lately and i keep having to explain the same pandas patterns over and over to claude. stuff like handling missing values, deduplicating rows, normalizing column names, converting types. can you turn this into a reusable skill? i mainly work with csv files and sometimes parquet
assertions: A SKILL.md file exists in the output skill directory
The SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter with name and description fields
The description includes 'Use when' trigger conditions mentioning data cleaning or pandas
The SKILL.md body covers handling missing values with code examples
The SKILL.md body covers deduplication with code examples
The SKILL.md body covers column name normalization or type conversion
The SKILL.md body uses progressive disclosure by referencing separate files for detailed patterns
An evals/evals.json file exists with at least 2 test cases
The SKILL.md body includes a Common mistakes or pitfalls section
The SKILL.md body contains a workflow or ordered checklist for the cleaning pipeline

prompt: I need a skill for deploying Next.js applications to AWS using CDK. It should cover the full workflow: building the app, synthesizing the CDK stack, deploying to staging first then production with a manual approval gate. The skill needs to handle environment-specific configs and include rollback procedures. Make sure there are scripts for common operations.
assertions: A SKILL.md file exists in the output skill directory
The SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter with name and description fields
The description includes 'Use when' trigger conditions mentioning Next.js and deployment
The SKILL.md body contains a multi-step numbered deployment workflow
The SKILL.md body mentions staging and production environments
The SKILL.md body includes rollback procedures with specific steps
A scripts/ directory exists with at least 2 deployment-related scripts
The scripts use Bun TypeScript (.ts files) as the preferred runtime
An evals/evals.json file exists with at least 2 test cases
The SKILL.md body includes a Common mistakes or pitfalls section
The SKILL.md body is under 500 lines
